channel.title: MD on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in MD on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Cecil County Sheriff’s Office (MD)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Cecil County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: March 9, 2020 County: Cecil County State: MD FIPS: 24015

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Carroll County Detention Center — Carroll, MD
